Barbacoa at Arts Riot

with

  • Dec 30, 2014
  • Burlington, New York

My wife and I spend new years with Burlington’s long-standing instrumental surf-rock trio. Their bandcamp. They’ve been at this game for 30 years. The guitarist, Bill Mullins always gives me Harry Dean Stanton vibes, when I catch him playing or around town. His look and genre feel very Stanton.

  • concert
  • Barbacoa
  • Arts Riot
  • New York
  • Burlington
